notes: FRESH-TAB RETRY of the prior hang. Closed that stuck tab entirely and opened a NEW https://chat.deepseek.com/ tab via ctrl+t. It loaded cleanly to the 빠른 모드 new-chat screen, confirmed logged-in as 최장희 (no sign-in wall, '채팅 기록 없음'). Pasted the Korean PII prompt via clipboard+ctrl+v (full text verified in composer: '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567'), submitted with Enter. Within ~12s the block warning rendered cleanly in the answer area: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — fully visible end-to-end, contains expected_text '보안 정책'. NO hang this run: renderer responded normally and fast, no 'generating' stall, no '응답 없는 페이지' dialog. Conclusion: the prior hang was TRANSIENT/renderer-wedged, NOT reproducible — a fresh tab cleared it immediately. NO HTTP2 error: no ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR / connection-reset / unreachable page at any point; site loaded fine. Sister h2_es=2 service zeta (1464) also PASSed clean this round, consistent with the R1 max_age dead-code removal being behavior-neutral on the shared deferred-END_STREAM codepath.
